title: RapidMeta Oncology | First-Line ALK-TKIs in ALK-Positive Advanced NSCLC v1.0
hero_h2: First-Line ALK Tyrosine-Kinase Inhibitors in ALK-Rearranged Advanced Non-Small-Cell Lung Cancer

pico.pop: Adults with treatment-naive advanced ALK-rearranged non-small-cell lung cancer (stage IIIB-IV), ECOG 0-2, with or without baseline CNS metastases
pico.int: Second / third-generation ALK tyrosine-kinase inhibitor first-line: alectinib 600 mg PO BID (ALEX), brigatinib 90 mg QD x 7d then 180 mg QD (ALTA-1L), lorlatinib 100 mg PO QD (CROWN), or ensartinib 225 mg PO QD (eXalt3)
pico.comp: Crizotinib 250 mg PO BID (first-generation ALK-TKI; standard of care 2014-2017)
pico.out: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (PFS; primary in all four trials, time from randomization to documented progression or death; HR vs crizotinib)
pico.subgroup: Baseline CNS metastases, sex, race / ethnicity (Asian vs non-Asian), age, smoking status, prior chemotherapy exposure

real_data_entries.name: ALEX
real_data_entries.group: Alectinib 600 mg BID vs crizotinib 250 mg BID; 1L ALK+ advanced NSCLC; primary investigator-assessed PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Peters S et al. NEJM 2017;377:829-838 (ALEX alectinib 1L).

real_data_entries.name: ALTA-1L
real_data_entries.group: Brigatinib 180 mg QD (with 7-day 90 mg lead-in) vs crizotinib; 1L ALK+ advanced NSCLC; primary BIRC-PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Camidge DR et al. NEJM 2018;379:2027-2039 (ALTA-1L brigatinib 1L).

real_data_entries.name: CROWN
real_data_entries.group: Lorlatinib 100 mg QD vs crizotinib; 1L ALK+ advanced NSCLC; primary BIRC-PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Solomon BJ et al. NEJM 2020;383:2018-2029 (CROWN lorlatinib 1L).

real_data_entries.name: eXalt3
real_data_entries.group: Ensartinib 225 mg QD vs crizotinib; 1L ALK+ advanced NSCLC; primary BIRC-PFS
real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Horn L et al. JAMA Oncol 2021 (eXalt3 ensartinib 1L).
